dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, we had a shipment hit this morning. Since {quest_origin}, {quest_threat} has made off with {quest_focus} and vanished into the wilds.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I need someone who can {quest_action} before the trail goes cold. {quest_ally} spotted footprints heading {location_hint}. If you find {quest_item} along the way, grab them: they were part of the shipment.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_stakes} are at risk if word spreads that we cannot protect our goods.

playerResponses.text: I will pick up the trail. They will not get far.
What exactly was stolen? I want to know what I am recovering.
Hire a tracker. I am no bloodhound.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, {quest_threat} attacked {quest_stakes} at first light and fled before anyone could stop it. {quest_focus} left a blood trail heading into the hills.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need to {quest_action} and put it down before it circles back. The {enemy_type} was last seen {location_hint}. Take some {quest_item} in case you need to lure it out.
dialogueChunks.outro: This must be done {quest_time_pressure}. A wounded animal is twice as dangerous in the dark.

playerResponses.text: I will bring it down before sunset.
A wounded predator? That is a hard hunt. I want proper pay.
Let it bleed out on its own.

dialogueChunks.intro: Since {quest_origin}, {quest_threat} has not been seen. {player_name}, {quest_focus} was left wide open and something got through.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I need you to {quest_action}. Tracks lead {location_hint}. {quest_ally} thinks they may have had a reason to flee, but we need answers. Bring back any {quest_item} you find: they may have dropped their gear along the way.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_stakes} have a hole in them until we sort this out. Every hour matters.

playerResponses.text: I will find them and get to the bottom of this.
Sounds more like a deserter than a mystery.
Your personnel problems are not my concern.
